warriors_resolve.title: Warrior's Resolve
warriors_resolve.description: +5 max HP. The foundation of a true warrior.

heavy_strikes.title: Heavy Strikes
heavy_strikes.description: +10% melee damage. Every blow lands harder.

iron_skin.title: Iron Skin
iron_skin.description: +5% armor effectiveness. Your skin hardens like iron.

battle_focus.title: Battle Focus
battle_focus.description: +15% attack speed. Strike before your enemy can react.

berserker_rage.title: Berserker Rage
berserker_rage.description: +25% damage when below 30% HP. Fury fuels your strikes.

fortress.title: Fortress
fortress.description: +20% armor effectiveness. You become an immovable bulwark.

war_cry.title: War Cry
war_cry.description: AoE intimidation: nearby enemies gain Weakness I for 5s.

unstoppable.title: Unstoppable
unstoppable.description: +50% knockback resistance. Nothing can move you.

avatar_of_war.title: Avatar of War
avatar_of_war.description: All combat stats +10%. The pinnacle of martial mastery.
